🎟 Order Summary
{% for label, val in [ ('Ticket', ticket_info.get('title','N/A')), ('Route', ticket_info.get('source','?')+' → '+ticket_info.get('destination','?')), ('Type', ticket_info.get('type','N/A')), ('Seat', seat_number), ] %}
{{ label }} {{ val }}
{% endfor %}
Base Price ₹{{ ticket_info.get('price',0)|int }}
{% if ticket_info.get('discount',0) > 0 %}
Discount ({{ ticket_info.discount }}%) − ₹{{ (ticket_info.price * ticket_info.discount / 100)|int }}
{% endif %}
Total ₹{{ final_price }}
